description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and release, using the docker image and the docker:dind service. In the build stage add a build-master job that runs the script commands: docker login -u "$QUAY_USER" -p "$QUAY_PASSWORD" quay.io; docker build --pull --build-arg CI_COMMIT_SHA=${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8} -t "quay.io/xavierbaude/hello-world:${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}" .; docker tag "quay.io/xavierbaude/hello-world:${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}" "quay.io/xavierbaude/hello-world:latest"; docker push "quay.io/xavierbaude/hello-world:${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}"; docker push "quay.io/xavierbaude/hello-world:latest". In the release stage add a release-master job that runs: docker login -u "$QUAY_USER" -p "$QUAY_PASSWORD" quay.io; docker pull "quay.io/xavierbaude/hello-world:${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}"; docker tag "quay.io/xavierbaude/hello-world:${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}" "quay.io/xavierbaude/hello-world:stable"; docker push "quay.io/xavierbaude/hello-world:stable". Both jobs use the docker image and docker:dind service.
